title: Layer: Skills
description: A slide introducing the Skills layer. The pyramid is shown with the Skills tier highlighted. Three sub-concepts are presented: SKILL.md files, the Skill Creator meta-skill, and Hooks.

parts.title: SKILL.md
parts.description: A file card representing a SKILL.md document with a title, a short description of the task domain, and a list of numbered instruction steps. An arrow shows Claude reading the file before taking action. A row of tags at the bottom reads: Consistent · Auditable · Version-controlled.

parts.title: Skill Creator
parts.description: A three-step horizontal flow: (1) Describe the Workflow — a plain-language input box. (2) Claude Produces the SKILL.md — a generated file card appears. (3) Refine with Evals — a feedback loop icon with a checkmark indicating the skill has been tested and approved. Labels reinforce that skills are engineered, not just prompted.

parts.title: Hooks
parts.description: An event-trigger diagram showing three hook moments: Before Task Starts, After File Written, When Test Fails. Each event has an arrow pointing to a Skill icon, indicating automatic execution. A label reads: 'Skills run in response to events, not just explicit commands.'
